name: @provizhang/designer
description: MCP + CLI for autonomous iteration of claude.ai/design — drives the design surface via agent-browser, downloads handoff bundles, and exposes a tasting harness for full-viewport variant comparison.
author: Provi Zhang

scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run check && npm run build
scripts.postinstall: node -e "if (!process.env.npm_config_global) process.exit(0); console.log('\n  designer installed. Next: run `designer setup` to launch debug Chrome, sign in, and register the MCP.\n')"
